entities.name: NCT05715307
entities.context: Chinese Endocrinologists Health Education Study (CREATION), NCT05715307, prospective multicenter cluster randomized control study

entities.name: Observational
entities.context: Phase listed as NA for this interventional behavioral/educational study

attributes.note: Phase designated NA; mapped to Observational as closest normalized value

entities.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
entities.context: Study evaluates T2DM treatment ability in Chinese endocrinologists and patient HbA1c control in T2DM patients

entities.name: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine

entities.name: Intensive training for endocrinologists in T2DM management
entities.context: One-week intensive experiential training for endocrinologists including hospitalization experience at Ruijin Hospital, health examinations, results interpretation, and integrated training courses for T2DM management

attributes.components: Hospitalization experience, health examinations, results interpretation, integrated courses

entities.name: Regular training for endocrinologists in T2DM management
entities.context: Regular training and communication implemented by Ruijin Hospital under the guidance of T2DM management

entities.name: Intensive training group
entities.context: Intensive training group (EXPERIMENTAL): endocrinologists receive 1-week intensive training in T2DM health care at Ruijin Hospital; approximately 1000 patients managed

entities.name: Control group
entities.context: Control group (ACTIVE_COMPARATOR): endocrinologists receive regular training from MMC; approximately 1000 patients managed

entities.name: T2DM patients aged 40-65 with poorly controlled blood glucose at MMC
entities.context: Adults aged 40-65 with T2DM, BMI 24-35, HbA1c 7.5-10%, fasting glucose 8.0-13.3 mmol/L, first visit to MMC, diabetes duration <10 years, on 1-2 non-insulin hypoglycemic drugs

entities.name: HbA1c control rate
entities.context: Primary endpoint: percentage of patients achieving HbA1c <7.0% at 6 months

entities.name: glycated haemoglobin (HbA1c)
entities.context: Secondary outcome: HbA1c levels at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: systolic and diastolic blood pressure
entities.context: Secondary outcome: systolic and diastolic blood pressure at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: body weight
entities.context: Secondary outcome: body weight at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: waist circumference
entities.context: Secondary outcome: waist circumference at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: fasting blood glucose
entities.context: Secondary outcome: fasting blood glucose levels at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: 2-hour post-prandial blood glucose
entities.context: Secondary outcome: 2-hour post-prandial blood glucose levels at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: fasting serum insulin
entities.context: Secondary outcome: fasting serum insulin levels at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: 2-hour post-prandial serum insulin
entities.context: Secondary outcome: 2-hour post-prandial serum insulin levels at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: serum triglycerides
entities.context: Secondary outcome: serum triglycerides at 6 and 12 months

entities.name: HbA1c
entities.context: Screening HbA1c ≥7.5% and ≤10.0% required for inclusion; primary endpoint is HbA1c control rate <7.0%

attributes.use: Patient selection (inclusion criterion) and primary efficacy endpoint

entities.name: Ruijin Hospital
entities.context: Intensive training conducted at Ruijin Hospital (MMC leading center); regular training also guided by Ruijin Hospital

relations.target_entity: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
relations.evidence: Lead Sponsor: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine

Study evaluates improvement in T2DM treatment ability and patient outcomes in T2DM

relations.target_entity: T2DM patients aged 40-65 with poorly controlled blood glucose at MMC

Control group: approximately 100 endocrinologists and 1000 T2DM patients

relations.source_entity: Intensive training for endocrinologists in T2DM management
relations.target_entity: Regular training for endocrinologists in T2DM management
